tasks.subject: B3 Task a: Ledger.touch session-fields + is_session_busy helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helper at `core/lifecycle.py` correctly classifies ledger entries as busy vs not-busy; `Ledger.touch` persists `session_start` / `session_end` via existing `**extra` seam without altering `_PROTECTED_LEDGER_KEYS`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py`
- Test (create): `tests/core/test_ledger_session_fields.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_ledger_session_fields.py -v` → 12 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/core/lifecycle.py","tests/core/test_ledger_session_fields.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/core/test_ledger_session_fields.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["is_session_busy returns False on empty entry","is_session_busy returns True when session_start set + HB disabled","is_session_busy returns False on cleanly-closed session","is_session_busy returns True on busy + fresh HB","is_session_busy returns False on stale-busy auto-clear","is_session_busy returns False when HB enabled + tick missing","Ledger.touch persists session_start","_PROTECTED_LEDGER_KEYS does not include session_*"]}
```

tasks.subject: B3 Task b: deploy_session session_start / session_end writes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `deploy_session.__enter__` writes `session_start` via `Ledger.touch` after `hb_loop.start()` returns; `__exit__` writes `session_end` in finally block.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py`
- Test (create): `tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_fields.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_fields.py -v` → 6 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py","tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_fields.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_session_fields.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["session_start written post-hb_start","session_start absent when hosted","session_start absent when HB disabled","session_end written in finally","session_end written on exception","touch failure logs WARNING not raise"]}
```

tasks.subject: B3 Task c: _scan_warm_candidates + _probe_lock_held + _ScanReport
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure CLI helpers walk ledger, filter cap-key matches, probe reaper:<id> + provision:<id>, validate via B4 chain, return first valid candidate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`
- Test (create): `tests/cli/test_scan_warm_candidates.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_scan_warm_candidates.py -v` → 18 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py","tests/cli/test_scan_warm_candidates.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_scan_warm_candidates.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["empty ledger returns None","provider mismatch coarse-filtered","cap_key mismatch coarse-filtered","busy entries coarse-filtered","reaper-held skip recorded","provision-held skip recorded","classify-not-live skip recorded","newest-tick tiebreaker","ScanReport summarize forms correct","_probe_lock_held semantics","fixed reason vocabulary"]}
```

tasks.subject: B3 Task d: --no-reuse argparse + single kwarg + reaper-locked destroy
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `--no-reuse` flag + `single: bool` threading + reaper-locked destroy at deploy_session.__exit__ for both orchestrator-managed AND caller-supplied paths (D7).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`, `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/batch.py`
- Test (create): `tests/core/test_orchestrator_no_reuse.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_no_reuse.py -v` → 9 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py","src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py","src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py","src/kinoforge/core/batch.py","tests/core/test_orchestrator_no_reuse.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_no_reuse.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["--no-reuse argparse on generate + batch","mutex with --force-attach exits 2","reaper:<id> lock during destroy","destroy fires for caller-supplied (D7)","TeardownError preserves ledger","hosted no-op","session_end written before destroy"]}
```

tasks.subject: B3 Task e: _cmd_generate + _cmd_batch wiring (scan dispatch + precedence)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Precedence chain (instance-id → no-reuse → warm_reuse_auto_attach=false → default scan); scan summary INFO log.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`
- Test (delta): `tests/cli/test_cmd_generate.py`, `tests/cli/test_cmd_batch.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_generate.py tests/cli/test_cmd_batch.py -v` → all passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py","tests/cli/test_cmd_generate.py","tests/cli/test_cmd_batch.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_generate.py tests/cli/test_cmd_batch.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["scan dispatched on default path","scan skipped on --no-reuse","scan skipped on warm_reuse_auto_attach=false","scan instance threaded to generate","summary INFO logged","--instance-id precedence","mutex enforced","D7 composition"]}
```
